overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving from an industrial highway through a toll booth checkpoint, transitioning into a neon-lit urban cityscape with holographic advertisements, and finally descending into a sunken roadway trench. The scene is set during golden hour with warm sunlight creating lens flares against futuristic skyscrapers and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial highway with power infrastructure

agents.ego_description: cruising on multi-lane highway through industrial district with power lines and storage facilities

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers with multiple cables stretching across the horizon
modern street lighting poles lining the left side of the highway
large cylindrical industrial tanks with metallic surfaces
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial highway during golden hour, with the sun low on the horizon creating warm lighting. The camera vehicle drives past electrical infrastructure and industrial storage tanks while maintaining a steady speed alongside moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway toll booth checkpoint with overhead signage

events.description: approaching and passing through toll booth checkpoint structure
passing under large highway sign gantry indicating directions to Westbrook

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed while passing through checkpoint and reading overhead directional signs

entered.detail: large overhead highway structure with toll collection booths and barriers
massive overhead sign structure displaying directions to Westbrook and Red Peaks
large illuminated advertising screens visible in the distant cityscape
tall futuristic tower projecting holographic advertisements into the sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a toll booth checkpoint with large overhead structures, passing under directional signage. The industrial landscape gives way to distant views of a futuristic city skyline with holographic towers and neon advertisements becoming visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway with neon advertisements and holographic displays

events.description: entering dense urban area with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards
navigating left curve through urban canyon with tall buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through neon-lit city streets, passing towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: green sports car overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: tall glass and steel buildings with reflective surfaces and geometric structural supports
curved overpass structure with concrete supports

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dense urban environment with towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays. The vehicle navigates a left curve through the city canyon, passing modern glass buildings and elevated highway ramps while the holographic tower dominates the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken urban roadway trench with concrete walls and overpasses

events.description: descending into sunken roadway trench with high concrete retaining walls
passing underneath multiple overpass bridges creating brief shadows

agents.ego_description: descending into and driving through the sunken trench, navigating under overpasses with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with graffiti art and weathered surfaces lining the sunken roadway
elevated highway crossing overhead with structural supports
colorful street art and tags painted on the concrete retaining walls
wooden electrical poles with transformers and cables

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends into a sunken urban roadway trench with high concrete walls covered in graffiti. The lighting becomes mixed as the camera passes under multiple overpass bridges, transitioning from the open cityscape to an enclosed corridor with utility poles and weathered infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide industrial highway that gradually transforms into a dense, neon-lit urban canyon before descending into a sunken roadway. It begins by driving past electrical infrastructure and storage tanks under the warm glow of a low golden hour sun. As the vehicle passes through a toll booth checkpoint under large overhead structures, the industrial landscape opens up to reveal a distant futuristic skyline dominated by holographic towers. The scene then shifts into a dense city environment, navigating a left curve through a canyon of glass skyscrapers and vibrant neon advertisements. Finally, the camera descends from the open cityscape into a sunken urban trench, passing under multiple overpass bridges and between graffiti-covered concrete walls.
